metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by Immy6315 — multi-agent PR reviewer and 5-role engineering org plugins.

plugins.name: gr-reviewer
plugins.description: Multi-agent PR reviewer — runs 7 specialist AI agents in parallel and posts inline GitHub comments.

plugins.name: eng-org
plugins.description: 5-role multi-agent engineering org — EM, Tech Leads, Domain Devs, independent Test agents, specialist Reviewers (architecture / security / performance / standards / observability / indexes), and a system **Architect** that produces versioned ADRs BEFORE any TL decomposes tasks. Drops a complete governance + review pipeline into any project via /eng-org:init. Ships with 9 binding guardrails (G-1..G-9) including visual-parity gate, regression-check.md per task, device-boot smoke for native deps, batch cap, design-divergence registry, and the API contract-parity gate. /eng-org:architect runs an adversarial 3-reviewer loop against an explicit scale brief + banned anti-pattern list + locked tech stack. A portable context layer (AGENTS.md universal entry point, machine-readable eng-org.json manifest, dated DECISIONS.md ADR logs, and a multi-project scaffolder via /eng-org:new-project) lets any AI or engineer pick a project up cold. New in 0.6.0: the /eng-org:graphyfy skill draws idempotent Mermaid linking-graphs (module/layer deps, domain & data-model relationships, requirement→task DAG, role pipeline) into governance/graphs/. New in 0.10.0: /eng-org:sync pushes the shared governance context to a git remote for cross-machine sync — repo-guarded (self-skips when no context repo exists) and auto-wired into /eng-org:em-intake (on new REQ) and /eng-org:merge-readiness (on readiness). New in 0.11.0: G-7 API contract-parity gate + G-8 contract registry — the backend analogue of the visual-parity gate. The test-integration agent captures a normalized before/after response snapshot per touched endpoint (zero-dep contract-diff.mjs strips volatile fields), so unregistered response-contract drift BLOCKs merge and a private-field leak on a public/unauthenticated endpoint is an unconditional block. New in 0.12.0: Mode L autopilot — an autonomous build-until-done loop. /eng-org:autopilot runs the G-9 clarity gate (8-item scorecard incl. feasibility + dependency pre-flight, interview until 8/8, authority grants, architect plan preview → human approval); then scripts/autopilot-driver.sh re-invokes /eng-org:autopilot-iterate in a fresh context per iteration (one pipeline stage of one REQ), with decide-and-log/park on ambiguity (never asks mid-loop), a fingerprint circuit breaker against doom loops, per-milestone retros whose learnings bind only after validation, and an immutable SPEC/acceptance-criteria zone against reward hacking. Merges stay human. New in 0.13.0: GR deep-review inside /eng-org:run-reviews — the gr multi-specialist engine reviews each REQ's diff in local-diff mode (gr review --range base..HEAD; any base branch, no GitHub PR, no token, nothing posted), with zero-install auto-resolution of the gr binary via scripts/gr-ensure.sh (no gr-reviewer plugin required; graceful skip when offline), a mandatory TL evidence-verification gate over every GR finding (dispositions in gr-review.md, enforced by merge-readiness), and a learning loop appending confirmed findings to governance/MISTAKES.md. New in 0.14.0: Tier 1 token-optimization v2 — report diet v2 (verdict-carrying reports capped at ~40-line prose on GREEN/APPROVE, unbounded on RED/BLOCK; evidence paths mandatory in frontmatter; TL forced-sampling audit every REQ; dev-reports/gr-review/em-summary/retro/merge-readiness exempt), incremental fix-iterations v2 (scripts/invalidation.mjs computes transitive-import-closure BFS to pin unaffected tiers as GREEN@<sha> (pinned) with audit trail; reviewer-security/test-regression/G-7/GR always re-run; mistakes_sha256 hash-guards MISTAKES.md staleness), context pack v2 (dedicated context-packer agent authors verbatim tag-sliced extracts per REQ; GUARDRAILS.md always included whole; exclusion manifest mandatory; raw-doc escape hatch logged; rotating canary reviewer reads raw and files pack_audit verdict; test-regression and GR always read raw).
